title: Sibiu、Sibiu — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Sibiu、Sibiuの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

SibiuはSibiuにある人口147,245の都市です。A beautifully preserved Saxon medieval city in Transylvania, a former European Capital of Culture with fortified churches, cobblestone streets, and a rich German heritage.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
